text.title: Dormant Lead Reactivation Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 47 dormant contacts segmented + 3 sequences drafted for a freelance dev's Q2 rebalance.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Freelance dev. Q2 portfolio rebalance. 47 dormant contacts: 12 past clients, 18 lost proposals, 17 nurture leads. Owner: @ruslan. Geography: US 70%, EU 30%.

section.title: Output (excerpt)
section.code:
Spec 1: dlr-2026q2-past-client (segment=past-client, contacts=12) Touch 1 (email): "How's <project> doing one year on?" — references prior project Touch 2 (email, +10d): "One small idea for <project>" — pitches a follow-up Touch 3 (email, +14d): "Closing the loop" — polite close
Spec 2: dlr-2026q2-lost-proposal (segment=lost-proposal, contacts=18) Touch 1 (email): "Following up on <proposal-date> proposal" — references prior pitch Touch 2 (linkedin, +10d): "Shared <case-study> that addresses the <objection>" — proof Touch 3 (email, +14d): "Let's close this loop"
Spec 3: dlr-2026q2-nurture-lead (segment=nurture-lead, contacts=17) Touch 1 (email): "Consent re-confirm" for 5 EU contacts with consent_age_months > 18 Touch 1 (email): "I noticed <signal>" for US contacts Touch 2 (email, +14d): "One short read on <topic-from-last-conversation>" Touch 3 — quarterly-review opt-in only

list.item: past-client: 5 engaged (1 new project, 4 quarterly-review opt-in); 7 killed.
Total contacts moved from "pending" to actionable outcome: 47 → 0 pending at quarter end.
